map_coverage: {done} o {total} kūlanakauhale i kālailai ʻia a hiki i kēia manawa - hoʻohui ʻia ke koena i kēlā me kēia lā.
cur_so_far: {year} a hiki i kēia manawa (i ka {day} {month}): {v} °C ma ka awelika, {d} °C vs ka mean 1961-1990 no nā lā like o ka makahiki.
cmp_title: E hoohalike i na kulanakauhale elua
cmp_hint: ʻO kēlā me kēia pihi ka anomaly makahiki o kēlā kūlanakauhale a me kāna kumu 1961-1990 ponoʻī, no laila, hoʻohālikelike nā wahi me nā ʻano ʻokoʻa.
kpi_since: ʻO ka hoʻomehana honua mai ka makahiki 1940
sum_season: ʻO ke kau mehana wikiwiki loa ma ʻaneʻi: {season} ({v} °C i kēlā me kēia ʻumi makahiki).
sum_month: ʻO ka mahina mehana wikiwiki loa ma ʻaneʻi: {month} ({v} °C i kēlā me kēia ʻumi makahiki).
grid_alias_note: Hoʻopili ʻia ka moʻolelo wela ma kēlā me kēia ~11 km ke aniani-data grid cell. Kaʻana like ʻo {alias} i kāna kelepona me {city}, no laila hōʻike ʻelua i ka moʻolelo like 1940-i kēia manawa.
map_coverage_help: Kōkua i ka hōʻiliʻili ʻana i ka ʻikepili
guide_title: ℹ️ Pehea e heluhelu ai i kēia mau pakuhi
guide_body:
• Nā kiko / kaola: ka waiwai no kēlā me kēia makahiki.
  • Pipi kala ʻulaʻula: he LOESS smoother: ke au kūloko, manuahi ke kulou, no laila hiki iā ʻoe ke ʻike i ka hoʻololi ʻana o ka helu i ka manawa (e like me ka wikiwiki ʻana o ka mahana ma hope o ~1985).
  • Laina kuʻi: ke au pololei ikaika (Theil-Sen); ʻO kona pali ka helu "no ka ʻumi makahiki" ma ka moʻolelo.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Koʻikoʻi Mann-Kendall: inā he ʻano helu maoli ke ʻano a i ʻole he walaʻau wale nō (ns = ʻaʻole koʻikoʻi). He mea nui loa ka mahana; ʻAʻole pinepine ka ua.
  • Pāʻani malu: ka laulā mōʻaukala piha i nā makahiki a pau no ia mahina.
  • Nā kala palapala wela: ka mahana (blue cold → red warm); e heluhelu i kahi kolamu mai lalo a luna e nānā i ka hoʻololi ʻana o kēlā mahina i nā makahiki.
threshold_title: Nā lā wela a me ka hau i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
yearly_title: ʻO ka mahana wela o ka makahiki i nā makahiki, {name}
yearly_ylabel: Ka wela wela o ka makahiki (°C)
heatmap_title: ʻO ka mahana wela o kēlā me kēia mahina ma ka makahiki, {name}
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} lā · wela loa {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), anu loa {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
card_mean: ʻO ke ʻano o ka mahana o kēlā me kēia lā
share_copied: Ua kope kope ʻia ka loulou
analog_line: Ma ka makahiki 2050, hiki ke ʻike ʻia ke aniau kūloko e like me {analog} i kēia lā, ma kahi o +{d} °C ʻoi aku ka mahana.
analog_past: I ka makahiki 1940, ʻoi aku ka like o ke aniau kūloko i ka {analog} i kēia lā, ma kahi o {d} °C ʻoi aku ka maʻalili.
cap_yearly: ʻO ka manaʻo makahiki me kahi LOESS smoother (hōʻike i ka wikiwiki) a me kahi ʻano Theil-Sen ikaika +koʻikoʻi.
cap_anomalies: ʻO kēlā me kēia makahiki ke hoʻohālikelike ʻia me ka awelika 1961-1990: ʻoi aku ka mahana o nā pahu ʻulaʻula, ʻoi aku ka maʻalili uliuli. ʻO ka hoʻololi ʻana mai ka hapa uliuli a i ka ʻulaʻula ka hapa nui.
cap_heatmap: ʻO ka awelika o kēlā me kēia mahina no kēlā me kēia makahiki ma ke ʻano he mākia waihoʻoluʻu (2 °C bands). E heluhelu i kahi kolamu i luna e nānā i ka mahana o kēlā mahina i nā makahiki.
cap_anom_heatmap: Māhele like, akā ua ana ʻia kēlā me kēia mahina i kona mau makahiki 1961-1990, no laila, ʻo ka hoʻololi wale ʻana e hōʻike ana (ʻoi aku ka mahana o ka ʻulaʻula ma mua o ka maʻamau, ka ʻulaʻula ʻulaʻula), hoʻoneʻe ʻia ke kaʻina kau.
cap_threshold: ʻO nā lā i kēlā me kēia makahiki ma luna o 18 °C (wela) a ma lalo o 0 °C (ka hau hau). ʻO ka hele ʻana o nā ʻano ikaika ʻelua, ʻoi aku ka nui o nā lā wela i kēia manawa ma mua o nā lā hau.
hint: Kaomi ma kahi a i ʻole e kaomi iā Esc e pani
site_title: Nā mahana o ke kūlanakauhale honua
intro: Pehea i mahana ai nā kūlanakauhale nui o ka honua mai ka makahiki 1940: nā moʻolelo wela o kēlā me kēia lā mai ka ERA5 climate reanalysis.
map_heading: Nā wela a puni ka honua
map_sub: E koho i ke kūlanakauhale ma ka palapala ʻāina a i ʻole mai ka papa inoa
map_filter: Hōʻike i ka ʻāina a i ʻole ka ʻāina
omni_ph: Huli i ke kūlanakauhale, ka ʻāina, ka ʻāina a i ʻole kekahi wahi
range_title: Ka pae wela o ka mahina ma nā makahiki, {name}
range_ylabel: Ka wela wela o ka mahina (°C)
cap_range: ʻO ka palena min-max o kēlā me kēia mahina i nā makahiki, me ka makahiki hope loa. ʻO ka puliki ʻana i ka ʻaoʻao mahana?
record_title: Hoʻopaʻa moʻolelo mahina kiʻekiʻe/haʻahaʻa i kēlā me kēia lā, {name}
record_ylabel: Ka wela o kēlā me kēia lā (°C)
cap_records: ʻO kēlā me kēia mahina i nā manawa a pau i kēlā me kēia lā ke kiʻekiʻe a me ka haʻahaʻa, me nā kiʻekiʻe o ka makahiki hope loa
volatility_title: ʻO nā loli wela o kēlā me kēia lā i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
volatility_jump: lele i kēlā lā i kēia lā
volatility_ylabel: Nā lā me ka lele nui
cap_volatility: ʻEhia ka nui o ka lele wela o kēlā me kēia lā i kēlā me kēia makahiki (≥6 °C), ʻokoʻa ka wela
cap_precip: Ka nui o ka ua makahiki (ka ua a me ka wai hau) me ke au
cap_stripes: Hoʻokahi makahiki ka wela o kēlā me kēia kaha: ʻoi aku ka ʻulaʻula, ʻoi aku ka mahana ma mua o ka awelika o ka makahiki 1961-1990. ʻO ka neʻe ʻana mai ka uliuli a i ka ʻulaʻula ka mea hoʻomehana, ʻaʻohe mea e heluhelu ai akā ke kala.
season_title: Ka lōʻihi o ka wā ulu, {name}
season_ylabel: Ka lōʻihi o ka wā ulu (lā)
cap_season: ʻO ka lōʻihi o ke kau ulu wela i kēlā me kēia makahiki (e holo ana i nā lā me ka mean o kēlā me kēia lā ≥ 5 °C): pili ka mahiʻai puka makani ʻole i ka hau, e hoʻolōʻihi i ka wā e mahana ana ke aniau.
dtr_title: Ka pae wela o ka lā (lā − pō), {name}
dtr_ylabel: ʻO ka nui o kēlā me kēia lā − min (°C)
cap_dtr: ʻO ka ʻokoʻa ma waena o ke kiʻekiʻe a me ka haʻahaʻa o kēlā me kēia lā. ʻO ka hōʻemi ʻana he ʻano manamana lima ʻōmaʻomaʻo: ʻoi aku ka wikiwiki o nā pō ma mua o nā lā; hiki i ka mea hoʻonui ke hōʻailona i ka maloʻo.
seasonshift_title: Pehea ka neʻe ʻana o ka pōʻai kau, {name}
seasonshift_ylabel: Ka wela wela o ka mahina (°C)
cap_seasonshift: ʻO ka makahiki maʻamau no ka makahiki mua vs. Hōʻike ka ʻokoʻa ma waena o nā pihi i kēlā me kēia mahina i nā ʻāpana o ka makahiki i mahana loa (ʻoi aku ka hoʻoilo ma mua o ke kauwela).
health_heading: Nā hōʻailona pili i ke olakino
health_sub: Pehea ka unuhi ʻana o nā ʻano mehana ma luna nei i nā ana hoʻolaha ʻike wela, ke anu, a me nā hanana koʻikoʻi. Hōʻike ʻia kēlā me kēia pakuhi i kahi e loaʻa ai ka ʻikepili e pono ai.
degreedays_title: Nā lā wela a me ka hoʻoluʻu, {name}
dd_ylabel: Nā lā degere i kēlā me kēia makahiki (°C·lā)
cap_degreedays: ʻO ka kaumaha hoʻoluʻolu wela o ka makahiki: hāʻule ka pono wela (ma lalo o 18 °C) i ka wā e piʻi ai ka pono hoʻoluʻu (ma luna o 22 °C), kahi mea koho no ka ʻike anu a me ke koi ʻana i ka ea.
heatwave_title: Nā lā hawewe wela i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
heatwave_ylabel: Nā lā hawewe wela i kēlā me kēia makahiki
cap_heatwave: Nā lā i ka nalu wela: he holo o ≥3 lā me ke kiʻekiʻe o kēlā me kēia lā ma luna o ka 1961-1990 90th percentile. ʻO ka wela o ke ao ke kumu nui o ka make ʻana o ka hawewe wela.
tropic_title: ʻO nā pō wela i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
tropic_ylabel: Nā pō i kēlā me kēia makahiki
cap_tropic: ʻO nā pō i ka noho ʻana o ka haʻahaʻa ma luna o 20 ° C, no laila ʻaʻole loaʻa i ke kino ke hoʻomaha i ka pō, kahi alakaʻi alakaʻi, ʻike pinepine ʻole ʻia o ka make pili i ka wela.
coldspell_title: Nā lā anuu i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
coldspell_ylabel: ʻO nā lā anuanu i kēlā me kēia makahiki
cap_coldspell: Nā lā i loko o ke anu: he holo o ≥3 lā me ka haʻahaʻa o kēlā me kēia lā ma lalo o ka 1961-1990 10th percentile. ʻO ke anu lōʻihi e hoʻoulu i ka hoʻoilo maʻi cardiovascular a me ka hanu nui o ka make.
heavyrain_title: Nā lā ua nui i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
cap_heavyrain: ʻO nā lā me ka liʻiliʻi o 20 mm o ka ua (ETCCDI R20mm), nā ua e hoʻoulu i ka wai e lawe mai i ka pōʻino, ka neʻe ʻana a me ka maʻi lawe wai.
heatindex_title: Nā lā helu wela wela i kēlā me kēia makahiki, {name}
cap_heatindex: ʻO nā lā e hiki ai ka mahana (heat index, e pelu ana i ka haʻahaʻa) i nā pae wela-koʻikoʻi, e hoʻohana ʻia nā ʻōlelo aʻoaʻo wela lehulehu. Pono ka ʻikepili ʻike wela.
footer: Hana ʻia {date} · ʻikepili mai Open-Meteo hōʻike hou i ka mōʻaukala (ERA5) · kumu ma GitHub
